issues.sample: The contact owns a 2024 Cadillac XT6. The contact stated that while driving at various speeds, the transmission malfunctioned, and the vehicle failed to properly accelerate. Also, while driving at an undisclosed speed, the transmission erroneously switched from the automatic mode

narrative.headline: What 2024 Cadillac Xt6 owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 14 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Power Train (50% of reports).
